commonArtDirection: Fictional streaming-series artwork. No real actors. No copyrighted characters. No studio logos. No platform branding. Cinematic premium TV style. High production value. Clean composition with room for UI overlays.

series.title: Night Signal
series.tagline: The future is calling after midnight.
series.description: A late-night radio host begins receiving calls that appear to predict disasters before they happen.
series.creator: Elian Cross
series.posterPrompt: Vertical cinematic streaming poster for a fictional sci-fi mystery series titled Night Signal. A lone radio tower at night, glowing red aircraft lights, storm clouds, eerie blue broadcast waves, premium thriller mood, no real actors, no logos.
series.backdropPrompt: Widescreen cinematic still for Night Signal. Remote radio station at midnight under storm clouds, subtle glowing signal lines in the sky, moody blue and red lighting, no text, no logos.

series.title: The Last Orchard
series.tagline: Every family tree has roots in the dark.
series.description: When three siblings inherit their family's failing orchard, they uncover a decades-old disappearance buried in the land.
series.creator: June Alder
series.posterPrompt: Vertical prestige drama poster for The Last Orchard. Foggy apple orchard at dawn, abandoned farmhouse, three distant silhouettes, autumn colors, quiet mystery, cinematic natural light, no logos.
series.backdropPrompt: Widescreen cinematic backdrop for The Last Orchard. Mist-covered orchard rows leading to an old farmhouse, warm sunrise cutting through fog, emotional drama atmosphere, no text.

series.title: Glass Harbor
series.tagline: A perfect town. A fractured truth.
series.description: A detective returns to her wealthy coastal hometown after a tech founder vanishes from his cliffside estate.
series.creator: Tessa Ward
series.posterPrompt: Vertical crime drama poster for Glass Harbor. Elegant glass mansion on a coastal cliff, dark ocean below, fractured reflection effect, cold luxury thriller look, no real brands, no logos.
series.backdropPrompt: Widescreen cinematic still for Glass Harbor. Modern glass house overlooking a stormy harbor, police lights faintly reflected in windows, sophisticated coastal noir mood, no text.

series.title: Orbit House

series.title: Dead Letter Office

series.title: Static Valley
series.tagline: Nothing changes here. That's the problem.
series.description: A desert town trapped in a repeating broadcast day begins to fracture when a teenager hears silence for the first time.
series.creator: Dane Marr

series.backdropPrompt: Widescreen cinematic still for Static Valley. Empty desert main street with old televisions in storefronts showing static, shimmering heat haze, surreal quiet horror, no text.
